title: Fixes in Imagenet training script
body:
* ngpus_per_node variable count fix
* dist_backend assertion added for nccl issue

step_plan.summary: Fixes in Imagenet training script by robustly counting GPUs per node and enforcing safe dist_backend usage to avoid NCCL-related initialization errors.

steps.reason: Ensure ngpus_per_node is correctly determined across CUDA-present and CPU-only environments; default to at least 1 to prevent world_size misconfiguration in distributed setups.
steps.side_effects: May alter world_size computation and distributed initialization; requires validation on CUDA-enabled, CPU-only, and multi-node environments; could affect startup logs and behavior.

steps.operation: Add dist_backend validation and NCCL guard in main_worker
steps.reason: Prevent NCCL usage when CUDA is unavailable and validate dist_backend values to fail fast with clear messages; improve error handling for invalid distributed configurations.
steps.side_effects: Improved error messaging for invalid configurations; may require tests or explicit dist_backend selections in certain environments; could affect CLI usage.
